=Module <<a_api_type subproject="server" | module Form >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Form>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api subproject="server" text=".." | module Form >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----


==@@id="2_Reactive form widgets"@@~Reactive form widgets==

<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEreact_component"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|'a>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|react~_component>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?step: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|step>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> 'a <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>> >><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive component~: a signal and its setter~.
>>


===@@id="3_Client-side utilities"@@~Client~-side utilities===


~Auto~-resize a textarea element to fit its content~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_validity e b>> adds or removes the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-invalid">> class on <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|e>>~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|valid e>> checks ~H~T~M~L~5 validity and absence of the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-invalid">> class~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|set~_custom~_validity e r>> sets the ~H~T~M~L~5 custom validity message on <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|e>>~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|select~_input~_value ev>> selects the text content of the input
    that triggered <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ev>>~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|on~_enter ~~f inp>> calls <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> with the input value when the user
    presses ~Enter~, provided the input is valid~.


===@@id="3_Buttons"@@~Buttons===

<<pre id="VALdisableable_button" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|disableable~_button>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?button_type: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Form_sigs>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_type>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| disabled: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_content>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Button ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A button that can be reactively disabled~.
>>


===@@id="3_Toggle button"@@~Toggle button===

<<pre id="VALreactive_toggle_button" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_toggle~_button>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?init: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?ctrl: >>bool <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_content>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Button ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> * bool <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A toggle button that alternates between on~/off states~.
    ~The ~C~S~S classes <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-toggle~-on">> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-toggle~-off">> are set
    reactively on the button element~.
>>


===@@id="3_Radio buttons"@@~Radio buttons===

>>


===@@id="3_Reactive inputs"@@~Reactive inputs===

<<pre id="VALreactify_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactify~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?input_r: >>string <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?value: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?validate: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> bool<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [ `Input | `Textarea ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Make an existing input or textarea element reactive~.
    ~Returns a signal tracking the current value and a setter~.
>>
<<pre id="VALreactive_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_input>> <<span class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a reactive text input~. ~Returns the element and
    a ~(signal~, setter~) pair~.
>>
<<pre id="VALtextarea" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|textarea>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|textarea_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a_rows: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?resize: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a_placeholder: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> `Textarea ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a textarea~, optionally with auto~-resize~.
>>
<<pre id="VALreactive_textarea" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_textarea>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|textarea_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a_rows: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?resize: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a_placeholder: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?value: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?validate: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> bool<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Textarea ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> * <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Create a reactive textarea~.
>>


===@@id="3_Debounced input"@@~Debounced input===

<<pre id="VALdebounced_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|debounced~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|input_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?delay: >>float <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?value: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?validate: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> bool<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> * string <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> *\\   <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive input where the debounced signal updates only after
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|delay>> seconds ~(default ~0~.~3~) of inactivity~. ~Returns
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(input~, ~(raw~_signal~, debounced~_signal~, setter~)~)>>~.
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|raw~_signal>> updates on every keystroke~; <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|debounced~_signal>>
    waits for the user to stop typing~.
>>


===@@id="3_Enter key binding"@@~Enter key binding===

<<pre id="VALlwt_bind_input_enter" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|lwt~_bind~_input~_enter>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?validate: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> bool<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?button: >>[ `Button ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [ `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Bind an ~Lwt action to an existing input~, triggered on ~Enter key
    or optional button click~.
>>
<<pre id="VALlwt_bound_input_enter" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|lwt~_bound~_input~_enter>> <<span class="odocwiki_info"|~Create an input with an ~Lwt action triggered on ~Enter key~.
>>


===@@id="3_Checkboxes"@@~Checkboxes===

<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEcheckbox_position"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|checkbox~_position>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|[ `Left | `None | `Right ]>> >><<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEcheckbox_style"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|checkbox~_style>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~=>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|[ `Box | `Bullet | `Small_bullet | `Toggle ]>> >><<pre id="VALcheckbox" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|checkbox>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|label_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a_inp: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|input_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?required: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?position: >><<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_position" | type Form.checkbox_position >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?checked: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?readonly: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?disabled: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?style: >><<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_style" | type Form.checkbox_style >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?mobile_style: >><<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_style" | type Form.checkbox_style >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|span_content>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Label ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  [> `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A customizable checkbox with position and style options~.
>>
<<pre id="VALreactive_checkbox" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_checkbox>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?position: >><<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_position" | type Form.checkbox_position >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?checked: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?readonly: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?disabled: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?style: >><<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_style" | type Form.checkbox_style >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?mobile_style: >><<a_api subproject="server" text="checkbox_style" | type Form.checkbox_style >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?ctrl: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> *\\        <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?step: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|step>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|span_content>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  < input : [> `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>;\\    label : [> `Label ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>;\\    manually_changed : bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>;\\    value : bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> >>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive checkbox~. ~The returned object provides~:
* <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|label>>~: the label element
* <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|input>>~: the input element
* <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|value>>~: a signal tracking whether it is checked
* <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|manually~_changed>>~: a signal tracking whether the user changed it

>>


===@@id="3_Validation"@@~Validation===

<<pre id="VALinput_validation_tools" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|input~_validation~_tools>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?init: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?set_focus: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?result_iter: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Js_of_ocaml>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Dom_html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|inputElement>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Js_of_ocaml>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Js>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\                string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >>\\               <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?invalid_class: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string, string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Result>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|input_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list *\\  [> `Class ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string, string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Result>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Given a validation function~, builds the necessary <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|oninput>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|onblur>>
    attributes for an input~, a reactive class attribute for error states~,
    and a signal with the validation result~.


    ~The invalid class is only shown after the first blur ~(graceful~)~.
>>
<<pre id="VALgraceful_invalid_style" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|graceful~_invalid~_style>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|[ `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Adds the <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"ot~-invalid">> class after each blur~. ~This allows styling
    for invalidity without showing errors before the user interacts~.
    ~Inspired by <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~:~-moz~-ui~-invalid>>~.
>>


===@@id="3_Integer inputs"@@~Integer inputs===

<<pre id="VALoptional_int_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|optional~_int~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?min: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?max: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?size: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  int option <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Div ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int option, unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|result>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An integer input with ~+~/~- buttons that can be empty ~(~None~)~.
    ~Displays <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~-">> when empty~.
>>
<<pre id="VALint_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|int~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?min: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?max: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?size: >>int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Div ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int, unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|result>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~An integer input with ~+~/~- buttons~. ~Always contains a value~.
>>


===@@id="3_Password input"@@~Password input===

<<pre id="VALpassword_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|password~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|input_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?placeholder: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Div ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  [> `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> * bool <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A password input with a visibility toggle button~.
    ~Returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(container~, input~, ~(visible~_signal~, set~_visible~)~)>>~.
    ~The toggle switches between <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|type~=password>> and <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|type~=text>>~.
    ~C~S~S classes~: <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-container>>~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-input>>~,
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-toggle>>~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-toggle~-show>>~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-toggle~-hide>>~.
>>


===@@id="3_Password toggle (non-reactive)"@@~Password toggle ~(non~-reactive~)===

<<pre id="VALpassword_toggle" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|password~_toggle>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  [ `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> [> `Div ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|password~_toggle inp>> wraps an existing password input element <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|inp>>
    in a container with a visibility toggle button~.
    ~Unlike <<a_api subproject="server" | val Form.password_input >>~, this does not use reactive signals~: it
    manipulates the ~D~O~M directly on click~, making it suitable for use
    with <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~D~.~Form~.input>> in ~Eliom forms~.
    ~C~S~S classes~: <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-container>>~,
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-toggle>>~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-toggle~-show>>~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|ot~-password~-toggle~-hide>>~.
>>


===@@id="3_Prevent double submit"@@~Prevent double submit===

<<pre id="VALprevent_double_submit" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|prevent~_double~_submit>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?button_type: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Form_sigs>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_type>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| f: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Client_value>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|button_content>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Button ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A button that disables itself while the action <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|f>> is running~,
    preventing double submissions~.
>>


===@@id="3_Reactive select"@@~Reactive select===

<<pre id="VALreactive_select" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_select>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|select_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| options: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string * string<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?selected: >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Select ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> * string <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|reactive~_select ~~options ~(~)>> creates a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~<select~>>> element with
    reactive selection tracking~. <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|options>> is a list of <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(value~, label~)>>
    pairs~. ~Returns the element and a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(signal~, setter~)>> pair~.
    ~The setter can be used to change the selection programmatically~.
>>


===@@id="3_Misc"@@~Misc===

<<pre id="VALvalidate_as_int" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|validate~_as~_int>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int option, unit<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Stdlib>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|result>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Validate a string as an optional integer~. ~Returns <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Ok ~None>> for
    empty strings or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~-">>~, <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Ok ~(~Some n~)>> for valid integers~,
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Error ~(~)>> otherwise~.
>>
<<pre id="VALnone_input_value" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|none~_input~_value>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~The string <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|"~-">>~, used as placeholder for empty optional int inputs~.
>>


===@@id="3_Reactive fieldset"@@~Reactive fieldset===

<<pre id="VALreactive_fieldset" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_fieldset>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|fieldset_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| disabled: >>bool <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Shared>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|React>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|S>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|fieldset_content>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Fieldset ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A fieldset that can be reactively disabled~.
    ~When disabled~, all form elements inside are disabled by the browser~.
>>


===@@id="3_Date and time inputs"@@~Date and time inputs===

<<pre id="VALparse_date" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|parse~_date>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int * int * int<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> option>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse a date string in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Y~Y~Y~Y~-~M~M~-~D~D>> format~.
>>
<<pre id="VALparse_time" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|parse~_time>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int * int<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> option>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Parse a time string in <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~H~H~:~M~M>> format~.
>>
<<pre id="VALstring_of_date" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|string~_of~_date>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|int * int * int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Format a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(year~, month~, day~)>> triple as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Y~Y~Y~Y~-~M~M~-~D~D>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALstring_of_time" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|string~_of~_time>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|int * int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> string>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~Format a <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~(hours~, minutes~)>> pair as <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~H~H~:~M~M>>~.
>>
<<pre id="VALreactive_date_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_date~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|input_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?value: >>int * int * int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int * int * int<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> option <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive ~H~T~M~L~5 date input~. ~The signal carries
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Some ~(year~, month~, day~)>> or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~None>> when empty~.
>>
<<pre id="VALreactive_time_input" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|reactive~_time~_input>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?a: >>[< <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html_types>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|input_attrib>> ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|attrib>> list <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| ?value: >>int * int <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  [> `Input ] <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Eliom>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Content>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Html>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|elt>> *\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>int * int<<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> option <<a_api subproject="server" text="react_component" | type Form.react_component >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|~A reactive ~H~T~M~L~5 time input~. ~The signal carries
    <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~Some ~(hours~, minutes~)>> or <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|~None>> when empty~.
>>


==@@id="2_Tab cycling (client-only)"@@~Tab cycling ~(client~-only~)==


~An ~H~T~M~L element which can be selected by pressing the tab key~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|setup~_tabcycle>> makes tab key loop over child elements of an element and
    only these elements~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|setup~_tabcycle~_auto>> scans an element for tabbable elements ~(buttons~, inputs~)
    and feeds them to <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|setup~_tabcycle>>

~Scan for focusable elements~, apply <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|setup~_tabcycle~_auto>> to them and
    focus the first~.

<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|prevent~_tab e>> prevents <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|e>> ~(and its children~) to be focused with tab key~.
    ~A function to restore the initial status is returned~.
